channel.title: Tool-Calling on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Tool-Calling on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Copilot code review now runs on an agentic architecture
item.description:
GitHub Copilot code review has moved to an agentic, tool-calling architecture and is now generally available.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: dotnet: Release v1.0 of the official MCP C# SDK
item.description:
MCP C# SDK v1.0 focuses on improved authorization handling, expanded metadata support, and added patterns for tool calling and long-running operations.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: github: New public preview features in Copilot code review: AI reviews that see the full picture
item.description:
GitHub announced new public preview features for Copilot code review that combine LLM detections and tool-calling with deterministic analyzers (for example ESLint and CodeQL) to produce smarter, more comprehensive reviews and enable a smooth handoff to the Copilot coding agent.

  • Source: GitHub
